name: Martha Stewart Living Omnimedia, Inc.
description: Martha Stewart Living Omnimedia, Inc. is a diversified American media and merchandising company founded by Martha Stewart in 1997. The company specializes in lifestyle content, creating media and merchandise across various categories including cooking, entertaining, home decor, gardening, crafts, and weddings. Known for its integrated approach to publishing, broadcasting, and product licensing, the brand inspires and engages consumers with unique lifestyle expertise. Since 2019, the company has been owned by Marquee Brands LLC, continuing its legacy of providing high-quality, practical advice and distinctive products for the home and everyday living.
